Behind Blue Eyes - Limp Bizkit

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

He'd lost the feeling in his fingertips an hour ago, so the pain was slightly dulled as the pliers wedged under the fingernail on his left ring finger. Ghost only grunted in discomfort as the nail slid free.

“Good,” the man said, looming over Ghost. He had the prick sitting in his lap as he tortured Ghost: his legs straddled the lieutenant's waist, way too close for comfort. Not that Ghost expected any kind of comfort in a place like this; a grungy, damp, mildewy basement of sorts. It was cold enough that Ghost's bare toes curled on the concrete floor. His entire body was cold and shivered gently. They'd liberated him of his jeans, his gear, his boots, his gloves. They'd stripped off his mask and cut away his shirt. Oddly, the mask felt more like peeling off his skin than just fabric. These fuckers knew his face.

A face he kept impassive as the man cut a long, delicate line up Ghost's forearm from knuckle to elbow, just
